channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmoneyAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLmoneyAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘I have a moral and ethical conundrum’: My husband was killed by a careless driver. I received $2 million. What do I owe my stepdaughter?
item.description: “As the children grew, life became more complicated.”

item.title: Tariffs costs and refunds take the spotlight as Home Depot, TJX and other retailers report earnings this week
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down most of the Trump administration’s tariffs, but uncertainty remains for store chains.

item.title: Last week’s slump in asset-manager stocks was driven by private-credit fears. Here’s what’s worrying investors.
item.description: Shares of asset managers fell due to worries over a private-credit fund managed by Blue Owl Capital, triggering broader anxiety about spillover effect...

item.title: My ex-wife took out a $100K Parent PLUS loan for our son. Am I morally or legally obliged to pay it off?
item.description: “Our son makes $45,000 a year and has no immediate prospects for significantly increasing his income.”

item.title: ‘I won’t take out a loan’: I need $18K in house repairs. Do I take it from my Roth, 401(k) or IRA?
item.description: “I plan to be debt-free in less than two years.”

item.title: How Small Businesses Can Do Better Together Than Apart With Coopetition
item.description: You already sense it. The game has tilted toward collaboration as the new face of competition. A small business competing in isolation is like an indi...

item.title: Beyond the Hype: The Messy Reality of Training AI
item.description: Scour LinkedIn jobs and you’re sure to come across half a dozen listings like the following: “Content Reviewer: Review AI content for clarity. Set you...

item.title: Custom Room Number Signs Keep Spaces Organized
item.description: Post sponsored by Bsign Store Room numbering is one of the most basic yet critical elements of interior navigation. In hotels, offices, residential co...

item.title: The Top 10 Side Hustles According to AI
item.description: Whether you need some extra cash, want to explore a new field, or desire more time at home with family, these top ten side hustles help you to meet yo...

item.title: How to Become the Go-To Expert in Your Industry
item.description: When founders tell me they “don’t have time” for thought leadership, I usually ask one question: If your ideal client were choosing between you and a ...

item.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
item.description: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on ...

item.title: Financial Services Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Gain insight on Experian, SoFi Technologies and more in the latest Market Talks covering Financial Services.

item.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
item.description: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

item.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
item.description: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

item.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
item.description: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia...
